checks.description: STEEPs classification vs content consistency (flags for LLM review)
checks.detail:
Priority 1: classified as E_Environmental but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 4: classified as S_Social but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 7: classified as T_Technological but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
checks.remedy: Review flagged signals: classification may not match actual content. LLM quality-reviewer should assess these cases.
